'''Chokk''' was a [[Klatooinian/Legends|Klatooinian]] bodyguard employed by [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]] in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]].

==Biography==
Chokk was a [[Klatooinian/Legends|Klatooinian]] [[Bodyguard/Legends|bodyguard]]<ref name="CCG" /> and explosives expert<ref name="YJCCG">{{YJCCG|set=Boonta Eve Podrace|cardname=Chokk|link=boontaevepodrace/dark/large/47chokkklatooinian.html}}</ref> who was in the [[Currency/Legends|paid]] service of<ref name="CCG" /> the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]]<ref name="Jabba">{{FactFile|38|JAB 1-4|Jabba the Hutt}}</ref> during [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]].<ref name="Date">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the events of {{Film|I}} to [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]].</ref>

==Personality and traits==
Chokk took pride in his work.<ref name="CCG" /> He had dark-colored [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] and dark [[Color/Legends|red]] skin.<ref name="TPM" />

==Skills and abilities==
The Klatooinian was very good at his work.<ref name="CCG" />

==Equipment==
During the Boonta Eve Classic in 32 BBY, Chokk wore dark blue [[Clothing/Legends|pants]] and a crimson tunic fastened with a [[Belt/Legends|belt]] that had an array of pouches.<ref name="TPM" />

==Behind the scenes==
Chokk first appeared in [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']], which was released in [[1999]].<ref name="TPM" /> Chokk was later identified in [[Star Wars: Episode I: The Visual Dictionary|Star Wars: Episode I The Visual Dictionary]] as one of Jabba Desilijic Tiure's bodyguards during the Boonta Eve Classic.<ref name="VG">''[[Star Wars: Episode I: The Visual Dictionary]]''</ref> However, this depiction was contradicted by [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game]] and the ''[[Young Jedi Collectible Card Game]]'', both of which were released in [[2001]].<ref name="CCG">{{CCG|set=Coruscant Limited|cardname=Chokk}}</ref><ref name="YJCCG" /> While the respective Card Games used an image of a Klatooinian in a red tunic, the ''Visual Guide's'' uses an image portraying Chokk as an armed guard standing near the Hutt that is clearly contradictory to the Card Games' images.<ref name="VG" />
